ItacAcademyItem.Name: Animosi-Bologna (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Tower, its top above the clouds, and trees around its base, with mathematical and optical instruments hanging beside the cartouche
ItacAcademyItem.Motto: Sublimi feriam sydera vertice (Hor. Ode I)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Michele Medici and Giovanni Fantuzzi, the Bolognese Captain Teodosio Poeti left a sum of money for the creation of this Academy in his last will (1549). He died in 1551, aged 32.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
